headline: IoT & AI Systems Engineer | IEEE Leader | Building Autonomous Embedded Systems
about: Computer Systems Engineering student focused on IoT, embedded AI, cybersecurity, and distributed autonomous systems. Passionate about building scalable hardware-software infrastructures combining ESP32 ecosystems, Raspberry Pi systems, machine learning, and real-time networking. Active IEEE leader with experience organizing hackathons, leading technical teams, and developing intelligent traffic systems, OTA infrastructures, and swarm communication architectures.

pinnedRepositories.name: RoidOTA
pinnedRepositories.description: Custom OTA platform for ESP32 fleets using MQTT and HTTP firmware delivery.

pinnedRepositories.name: smart-traffic-ai
pinnedRepositories.description: AI-powered smart traffic light system using Raspberry Pi, ESP32, Firebase, and computer vision.

pinnedRepositories.name: esp32-telegram-cam
pinnedRepositories.description: Motion-triggered ESP32-CAM security system with Telegram integration.

experience.title: Treasurer

experience.description: Working on a photobioreactor research project involving hardware integration, circuit design, embedded systems, and sustainable technology development.

education.description: Focused on embedded systems, AI infrastructure, networking, IoT, and advanced mathematics.
